title: Full Turtle Armor
body:
# Full Turtle Armor
This data pack completes the turtle armor set by adding the rest of the missing armor pieces. 

- The armor pieces themselves give the same amount of protection as chainmail armor.
- Wearing **Turtle Boots** gives you **Speed** while in water. This effect last for 5 seconds upon leaving water.
- Wearing the entire armor set gives you permanent **Resistance III**.

![Turtle armor set crafting recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/684c4207f9f35ef223718a39fabc9477f92ca733.png)

If you like what you see, you can support me on [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/shvara)!
